# ɳClaw Desktop — Keyboard Shortcuts

All keyboard shortcuts are customizable via **Settings > Shortcuts**. Default shortcuts differ between macOS and Windows/Linux.

| Shortcut | macOS | Windows/Linux | Section |
|----------|-------|---------------|---------|
| New Chat | ⌘N | Ctrl+N | Chat |
| Send Message | Enter | Enter | Chat |
| Insert Newline | Shift+Enter | Shift+Enter | Chat |
| Cancel Stream | Esc | Esc | Chat |
| Command Palette | ⌘K | Ctrl+K | Navigation |
| Commands Group | ⌘⇧P | Ctrl+Shift+P | Navigation |
| Toggle Sidebar | ⌘\ | Ctrl+\ | Navigation |
| Toggle Dark Mode | ⌘⇧D | Ctrl+Shift+D | Window |
| Open Settings | ⌘, | Ctrl+, | Window |
| Open Debug | ⌘⌥D | Ctrl+Alt+D | Window |
| Minimize Window | ⌘M | Ctrl+M | Window |
| Show All Shortcuts | ? | ? | Window |
| Undo | ⌘Z | Ctrl+Z | Editing |
| Redo | ⌘⇧Z | Ctrl+Shift+Z | Editing |

## Customizing Shortcuts

1. Open **Settings** (⌘, or Ctrl+,)
2. Navigate to **Shortcuts**
3. Click **Edit** next to any shortcut
4. Press the keys you want to bind
5. Click **Save** to apply

Press **?** anytime to view all shortcuts in a modal.
